TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Masuhuaz ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 306 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 291 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 93%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga Dakus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mas~…ēuńßuaz …£a nija mki s~…ēku takaw s~…ēi atu toweŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, rukaj *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a *akus~…ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Masuhuaz ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 306 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 291 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 93%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga Dakus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mas~…ēuńßuaz …£a nija mki s~…ēku takaw s~…ēi atu toweŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, rukaj *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na mas~…ēuńßuaz ńßja Ē …£a *akus~…ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
